title: China-to-US Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: Rechargeable Tool Battery Packs — UL 2595 / UL 2271 Evidence
rows.target_requirement: Cordless power-tool battery packs and battery-powered outdoor equipment packs are commonly evaluated separately from the tool body. UL 2595 is used for general battery-powered appliances and tools, while UL 2271 is used for batteries for light electric vehicle applications and may be requested where a pack design, chemistry, capacity, enclosure or use case overlaps with mobility-style packs. Retailers, NRTLs, insurers and workplace buyers may require evidence for cells, pack protection, charger compatibility, abuse testing, enclosure integrity, thermal runaway mitigation and markings.
target_standards: UL 2595 — General Requirements for Battery-Powered Appliances
UL 2271 — Batteries for Use in Light Electric Vehicle Applications
UN 38.3 transport testing for lithium batteries, where applicable
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese cordless-tool battery packs may be supported by GB 3883 tool-system evaluation, lithium battery transport testing, and Chinese battery safety standards. Those records can help identify risks, but US buyers normally expect pack-level evidence under UL-recognized standards and confirmation that the charger, pack and tool are evaluated together as a system.
china_standards: GB 3883 series — tool and system safety
Chinese lithium battery safety and transport test reports, where applicable
rows.gap: Battery packs are a separate risk path. A tool body listing may not cover alternate packs, replacement packs, aftermarket chargers, higher-capacity packs or private-label battery families. Exporters should lock the bill of materials, cell supplier, BMS firmware, enclosure materials, charger pairing, warnings and traceability before US NRTL or retailer review.

target.en: Often required by NRTL listing scope, retailer policy, insurer review, workplace buyer rules, or product-liability controls; not a single federal mark for every battery pack.
target.zh: 通常因 NRTL 列名范围、零售商政策、保险审查、工作场所采购规则或产品责任控制而被要求；并非适用于每个电池包的单一联邦标志。
target.zht: 通常因 NRTL 列名範圍、零售商政策、保險審查、工作場所採購規則或產品責任控制而被要求；並非適用於每個電池包的單一聯邦標誌。

cn.en: China battery and GB 3883 evidence may apply domestically but does not replace US pack-level evaluation.
cn.zh: 中国电池和 GB 3883 证据可能适用于国内市场，但不能替代美国电池包层面评估。
cn.zht: 中國電池和 GB 3883 證據可能適用於國內市場，但不能取代美國電池包層面評估。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat cordless-tool packs as their own compliance item. UL 2595 or UL 2271 evidence may be needed depending on tool type, pack use case and buyer requirements, and Chinese battery paperwork alone is not enough for US channel acceptance.

rows.requirement: FCC Part 15 — Electronic Controls, Digital Devices and Wireless Modules
rows.target_requirement: Power tools, chargers, docking stations, smart batteries, Bluetooth or Wi-Fi accessories, and app-connected tools may be radio frequency devices under FCC Part 15. Unintentional radiators generally require Supplier's Declaration of Conformity or certification depending on device type, while intentional radiators such as Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, proprietary RF and NFC modules require FCC certification unless a fully approved modular transmitter is used within its grant conditions.
target_standards: 47 CFR Part 2 Subpart J — Equipment authorization procedures
FCC Supplier's Declaration of Conformity and certification procedures
rows.china_equivalent: China power-tool electronics may be tested for EMC under Chinese GB standards, and radio modules may require China radio transmission equipment type approval when sold domestically. Those Chinese EMC or radio approvals do not replace FCC authorization for devices marketed or imported into the United States.
china_standards: China EMC GB standards applicable to electrical tools or chargers
China radio transmission equipment type approval for domestic radio products
rows.gap: FCC scope is easy to miss on cordless tools because the tool may include a microcontroller, switching charger, LED driver, battery-management system, RFID/NFC tag, Bluetooth location function, or Wi-Fi connectivity. Exporters must classify each SKU as exempt, unintentional radiator, or intentional radiator, confirm the authorization route, maintain US responsible-party records, and ensure user manuals and labels carry required FCC statements.

target.en: Mandatory when the product is an FCC-regulated radio frequency device; authorization route depends on whether the device is an unintentional or intentional radiator.
target.zh: 当产品属于 FCC 监管的射频设备时为强制要求；授权路径取决于设备是非故意辐射体还是故意辐射体。
target.zht: 當產品屬於 FCC 監管的射頻設備時為強制要求；授權路徑取決於設備是非故意輻射體還是故意輻射體。

cn.en: China EMC or radio approvals may apply domestically but do not replace FCC authorization.
cn.zh: 中国 EMC 或无线电批准可能适用于国内市场，但不能替代 FCC 授权。
cn.zht: 中國 EMC 或無線電批准可能適用於國內市場，但不能取代 FCC 授權。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Any electronic, smart, wireless, charger, or battery-management feature can trigger FCC review. Chinese EMC or radio paperwork is not enough for US import or sale when FCC Part 15 applies.

rows.target_requirement: The United States does not operate one federal conformity mark equivalent to China's domestic certification structure for power tools. Practical acceptance is split across federal rules and market channels: NRTL listing is commonly required by AHJs, employers, insurers, and major retailers for electric shock and fire safety; FCC Part 15 applies to electronic or wireless functions; CPSC can act against unsafe consumer products; and OSHA rules apply in workplaces.
target_standards: 29 CFR 1910.7 — OSHA Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory program
FCC 47 CFR Part 15 — radio frequency devices
Consumer Product Safety Act — CPSC general authority
rows.china_equivalent: China power tools commonly use the GB 3883 series, based on IEC 62841-style safety requirements for hand-held, transportable and lawn/garden electric motor-operated tools. Domestic China market access may involve mandatory or scheme-specific certification depending on product scope, with test reports written to Chinese GB standards.
china_standards: GB 3883 series — Safety of motor-operated electric tools
China domestic certification and GB standard test reports
rows.gap: A China GB 3883 report is not a US market-access passport. Exporters must map each tool SKU to US safety listing expectations, FCC equipment authorization if electronics or radio modules are present, battery-pack evidence, retailer onboarding rules, workplace restrictions, and CPSC defect-reporting readiness. The absence of a single federal mark makes channel-specific acceptance evidence important.

target.en: No single federal mark is mandatory for all power tools. Specific obligations may be mandatory by rule, workplace use, FCC scope, AHJ enforcement, contract, or retailer policy.
target.zh: 并非所有电动工具都有一个强制的单一联邦标志。具体义务可能因法规、工作场所使用、FCC 范围、AHJ 执法、合同或零售商政策而成为强制要求。
target.zht: 並非所有電動工具都有一個強制的單一聯邦標誌。具體義務可能因法規、工作場所使用、FCC 範圍、AHJ 執法、合同或零售商政策而成為強制要求。

cn.en: GB 3883-series evidence is the common China safety baseline; domestic certification status depends on the exact product scope.
cn.zh: GB 3883 系列证据是中国常见安全基线；国内认证状态取决于具体产品范围。
cn.zht: GB 3883 系列證據是中國常見安全基線；國內認證狀態取決於具體產品範圍。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat the US as a multi-gate market, not a single-mark market. GB 3883 evidence can support engineering review but does not replace US NRTL, FCC, retailer, OSHA, or CPSC readiness work.

rows.requirement: Power-Tool Electrical Safety — UL 62841 / Legacy UL 60745 NRTL Listing
rows.target_requirement: For US sale and installation channels, electric and cordless power tools are commonly expected to be listed or certified by an OSHA-recognized NRTL to the applicable UL 62841 standard family, or legacy UL 60745 where still accepted for older product categories. This is not a universal federal consumer-product mark, but it is a de facto gate for AHJs, commercial buyers, insurers, employers, and major retailers because it documents evaluation for electric shock, fire, mechanical, thermal, enclosure, switch, charger interface, and abnormal-operation hazards.
target_standards: UL 62841 series — Electric motor-operated hand-held tools, transportable tools and lawn and garden machinery
UL 60745 series — Hand-held motor-operated electric tools, legacy categories
rows.china_equivalent: China commonly evaluates power tools under the GB 3883 series for motor-operated electric-tool safety. GB 3883 evidence may be technically related to IEC/UL 62841 concepts, but it is issued under the Chinese standards and certification ecosystem and is not an OSHA-recognized NRTL listing.
china_standards: GB 3883.1 — Safety of motor-operated electric tools, transportable tools and lawn and garden machinery — General requirements
GB 3883 product-part standards for drills, saws, grinders, sanders, screwdrivers and related tools
rows.gap: A GB 3883 test report does not substitute for a UL 62841 or UL 60745 listing mark from an OSHA-recognized NRTL. Exporters should plan construction review, critical component traceability, factory inspection, label control, follow-up service, and separate listings for chargers, detachable battery packs, and accessories when they are part of the certified system.

target.en: De facto mandatory for AHJ, retailer, employer, insurance and workplace acceptance; not a single federal consumer-product mandate for every power tool.
target.zh: 对 AHJ、零售商、雇主、保险和工作场所接受而言事实上强制；但并非适用于每一种电动工具的单一联邦消费品强制要求。
target.zht: 對 AHJ、零售商、雇主、保險和工作場所接受而言事實上強制；但並非適用於每一種電動工具的單一聯邦消費品強制要求。

cn.en: GB 3883-series compliance is the common China safety basis; certification route depends on product scope.
cn.zh: GB 3883 系列合规是中国常见安全基础；认证路径取决于产品范围。
cn.zht: GB 3883 系列合規是中國常見安全基礎；認證路徑取決於產品範圍。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] For US commercial channels, plan on NRTL listing to UL 62841 or accepted legacy UL 60745 unless a specific channel confirms otherwise. Chinese GB 3883 evidence is useful background, not a substitute for a US NRTL mark.

rows.requirement: OSHA Workplace Use — Approved Electrical Equipment
rows.target_requirement: When power tools are used in US workplaces, OSHA electrical-safety rules require equipment to be approved and used as instructed. OSHA recognizes NRTLs to test and certify products, and employers are expected to use equipment consistent with listing, labeling, grounding, guarding, cord, GFCI, maintenance and instruction requirements. This creates a workplace compliance gate even where a consumer retail sale is not directly subject to a single federal power-tool mark.
target_standards: 29 CFR 1910.7 — Definition and recognition of NRTLs
OSHA NRTL Program policies for listed and labeled equipment
rows.china_equivalent: China domestic workplace and product-safety controls may rely on GB 3883 tool safety, employer safety-management rules and Chinese inspection records. These do not demonstrate that a tool is approved for OSHA-regulated workplaces in the United States.
china_standards: China occupational safety and employer management requirements
rows.gap: For jobsite, factory, warehouse, rental fleet and commercial maintenance use, purchasers may reject tools that lack an acceptable NRTL listing or that are used outside listing conditions. Exporters should maintain US manuals, warnings, replacement-parts controls, charger and battery compatibility limits, and evidence that the exact model is listed by an OSHA-recognized NRTL.

target.en: Mandatory for OSHA-regulated workplace use where electrical equipment must be approved and used according to listing and labeling conditions.
target.zh: 在 OSHA 监管工作场所中，电气设备须经批准并按列名和标签条件使用，因此为强制要求。
target.zht: 在 OSHA 監管工作場所中，電氣設備須經批准並按列名和標籤條件使用，因此為強制要求。

cn.en: China workplace and GB evidence does not replace OSHA workplace approval expectations.
cn.zh: 中国工作场所和 GB 证据不能替代 OSHA 工作场所批准预期。
cn.zht: 中國工作場所和 GB 證據不能取代 OSHA 工作場所批准預期。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Workplace acceptance is a separate US gate. NRTL listing, correct labeling and use within instructions matter for employers even if a product can otherwise be sold through a consumer channel.

rows.requirement: CPSC General Consumer Product Safety and Defect Reporting
rows.target_requirement: Consumer power tools are within CPSC's general consumer-product safety oversight unless another federal agency has exclusive jurisdiction over a specific hazard. Manufacturers, importers, distributors and retailers must report certain defects, unreasonable risks, noncompliance, or incidents under CPSC rules and may face corrective action, recalls or import detention for unsafe products.
target_standards: 16 CFR Part 1115 — Substantial product hazard reports
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese GB 3883 testing and domestic quality records may support hazard analysis, but they do not replace US importer obligations to monitor incidents, evaluate defects, keep traceability records, report substantial product hazards, and conduct recalls when required by CPSC.
china_standards: China domestic product-quality and recall controls
rows.gap: US obligations continue after sale. Exporters and importers need incident intake, complaint triage, lot traceability, replacement battery and charger controls, recall execution plans, and English warnings. A compliant lab report does not eliminate CPSC reporting duties if real-world failures create a substantial product hazard.

target.en: Mandatory general consumer product safety and reporting obligations apply when CPSC jurisdiction and reporting thresholds are met.
target.zh: 当属于 CPSC 管辖且达到报告门槛时，一般消费品安全和报告义务为强制要求。
target.zht: 當屬於 CPSC 管轄且達到報告門檻時，一般消費品安全和報告義務為強制要求。

cn.en: Chinese GB or domestic recall records do not replace US CPSC reporting and corrective-action duties.
cn.zh: 中国 GB 或国内召回记录不能替代美国 CPSC 报告和纠正措施义务。
cn.zht: 中國 GB 或國內召回記錄不能取代美國 CPSC 報告和糾正措施義務。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] CPSC readiness is not a pre-sale mark, but it is mandatory once reporting duties are triggered. US importers should maintain traceability, defect review and recall procedures for power tools, chargers and battery packs.
